title: Make a subitem's parent more visible in calendar

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community

We recently added a small, but useful feature to Calendar Plus:

Showing a subitem’s parent item!

This is how a subitem looks in monday’s native calendar vs in Calendar Plus:

image750×293 26 KB

We’re always busy improving the calendar, so don’t hesitate to drop us a message.

Calendar Plus in the marketplace
